/opt/loongson-gnu-toolchain-13.2/bin/loongarch64-unknown-linux-gnu-g++  -O3 CMakeFiles/ncnn_detect_video.dir/smartCar/crop.cc.o -o ncnn_detect_video   -L/opt/loongson-gnu-toolchain-13.2/loongarch64-unknown-linux-gnu/lib  -L/home/wuwu/workspace/WuwuSama_Icar_Project/cross_lib/opencv/lib  -L/home/wuwu/workspace/WuwuSama_Icar_Project/cross_lib/json/lib  -L/home/wuwu/workspace/WuwuSama_Icar_Project/cross_lib/ncnn/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/loongson-gnu-toolchain-13.2/loongarch64-unknown-linux-gnu/lib:/home/wuwu/workspace/WuwuSama_Icar_Project/cross_lib/opencv/lib:/home/wuwu/workspace/WuwuSama_Icar_Project/cross_lib/json/lib:/home/wuwu/workspace/WuwuSama_Icar_Project/cross_lib/ncnn/lib -lopencv_core -lopencv_imgcodecs -lopencv_imgproc -lopencv_videoio -lncnn -lgomp
